description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage bench or low cabinet with a two-tone design, featuring a natural wood-finish top and a white-painted body. The front side displays three spacious drawers, each with a small round pull, and three open cubby shelves above the drawers, providing both concealed and open storage options. The sides and back are solid panels, with the back being completely plain and the sides framed for structural support. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for sitting or placing items. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a modern yet classic aesthetic. This piece would be well-suited for use in entryways, mudrooms, or public waiting areas in urban environments.
description: A two-tone wooden storage bench with a natural wood top, white body, three drawers, and three open cubbies. Sturdy, flat-topped, and suitable for both seating and storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid white panel and the natural wood top, with no visible drawers or shelves.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three drawers with round pulls and three open cubby shelves above, framed by the white body and wood top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the solid white panel and wood top.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted white panel with no drawers, shelves, or handles visible.
